programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 11
programme.desc: The final four face go-sees and the final 3 is revealed.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 12
programme.desc: The three remaining girls arrive in Buenos Aires for the Fashion Week. They have to work backstage.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Tiger, the pretty French underground fighter, is going to be executed in Berlin and Hogan's Heroes are to the rescue.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Radio detection equipment prohibits Hogan from using their usual radio so they borrow the one in Klink's car.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: LeBeau is passed off as a Gypsy fortune teller to help get a radar countermeasure device to London.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan has to help three German scientists escape from Stalag 13 and get to London.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Colonel Hogan and Commandant Klink go to London to steal a plane as part of a plan to ferret out German spies in England.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Posing as German officers, the Heroes try to get a German spy to disclose with whom he was working.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Disguised as a German officer's wife, Newkirk collects penicillin for the underground.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: To capture some secret papers, Hogan has a Russian woman convince Klink to volunteer for the Russian front.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan helps prove the German officer that Klink is defending is innocent of treason so he can get the plans that he had stolen for the Allies.

programme.title: Police Interceptors: Episode 10
programme.desc: The team try to shut down an unlicensed radio station.

programme.title: Police Interceptors: Episode 12
programme.desc: Damo finds a man unconscious and a suspicious driver tries to outfox the interceptors.

programme.title: Police Interceptors: Episode 7
programme.desc: Police dog Vader brings down a suspect.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Documentary series following an Essex police unit.

programme.title: Police Interceptors: Episode 10
programme.desc: The interceptors are attacked by axe-wielding criminals.

programme.title: Wildest Islands
programme.desc: Islands can be home to the most extreme examples of life, the wildest of people and the most dramatic landscapes. Natural selection fuels evolution in the most dramatic way

programme.title: Meerkat Manor: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Whiskers stray onto Commando territory.

programme.title: Wildest Places: Australia
programme.desc: Wildest Places explores some of the most incredible natural habitats on earth & a diverse range of wildlife.

programme.title: World's Wildest Encounters: Episode 2
programme.desc: In this episode of the documentary series Andreas Kieling encounters the last gorillas of Africa and sets off in search of the perhaps most aggressive descendant of the dinosaurs, the saltwater crocodile in Australia.

programme.title: Jungle Planet
programme.desc: One of the strangest ecosystems on the planet is the Spiny Forest of Madagascar where almost all the plants are armed with thorns like daggers.

programme.title: Wild Italy: Top Predators: The Wolf Pack is Back
programme.desc: The wolf is performing a spectacular come back in the mountains of Italy.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Felons Interrupted
programme.desc: Dog is confronted with two alleged felons in crisis. Family and friends of these bondees are convinced that they are getting into further trouble while awaiting trial, so Dog and the posse have to bring these men back to jail.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Let It Snow
programme.desc: Christopher is barely 21, already has a history of domestic abuse and assault, and is facing major time in a room without a view. This hunt won't be easy for Dog - the leads are few, informers and family are not forthcoming.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rush from Judgment
programme.desc: Facing hard time for forging checks, Melissa pulled a vanishing act at her sentencing hearing, bolting from the courthouse in broad daylight. Lucky for her bondsman, Dog and his posse are in Colorado and ready to help.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Burn & Return
programme.desc: Dog is busy. First, he's after a fugitive who is allegedly an expert in the game of "burn and return"- shoplifting goods to return them for cash refunds. But he's not easy to track.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Stormy Weather
programme.desc: Going after two fugitives in one day is tough enough without the facing Colorado's notoriously unpredictable weather. Today, it's the threat of severe thunderstorms, hail and area wide tornado warnings.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: One for the Money
programme.desc: It hurts Dog to see people who after years of walking the straight and narrow, suddenly lose their way. But today's case is a member of the law enforcement community who has recently gone astray, and that truly troubles the Dog.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Reality Check
programme.desc: Dog is back in Denver and in hot pursuit of a woman wanted for identity theft. The sad reality is that the identify which has been robbed is her own. She's traded in a bright future for a life on the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: No Piece of Cake
programme.desc: Being hunted by the Dog is a lousy way to celebrate your birthday but that's exactly the spot that Robert finds himself in today. He's missed his court date, quit his job, and vacated his last known address.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Prayers and Mace
programme.desc: Both brother Tim and fellow Honolulu bondsman James need Dog's help to track down their hard to find fugitives. The two cases on the docket today are challenging, especially the hunt for Gregory, a felon with a lengthy rap sheet.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: New Dog in Town
programme.desc: It's Beth's birthday and Dog knows just what she needs. He surprises Beth with Delilah, a puppy small enough to sit in the palm of her hand. Beth is so happy that she insists on taking the puppy with her on today's bounty.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: The Cannonball Runs
programme.desc: Jase enters an outhouse race to help promote Willie's Duck Diner, but when the Robertsons show up for the race, they face an unexpected rival - Phillip McMillan. Meanwhile, Willie attempts to create the world's greatest bologna sandwich.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Mo Math, Mo Problems
programme.desc: Willie helps Sadie with her homework by enlisting the guys to create a real-life version of a math problem, but when Jase and Willie get sidetracked helping Sadie, they rekindle an old argument of whether Jase can outrun a truck.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Coop! There It Is!
programme.desc: When Jep asks Willie and the guys to help move his old chicken coop into his new house, which is under renovation, Jessica takes issue with its appearance, leading the guys to yet another project - renovating the chicken coop.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Friday Afternoon Lights
programme.desc: When Willie becomes an assistant coach on Lil' Will's struggling football team, his authority is tested when the kids challenge the adults to a scrimmage. Meanwhile, Kay brings Jep and Si to an aquarobics class at a local health club.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Master and Duck Commander
programme.desc: When Jase and the guys transform an old pontoon boat into a floating duck blind, they are faced with the impending question of whether or not it will actually float. Meanwhile, Kay's dog Bobo misbehaves.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Inlawful Entry
programme.desc: When Missy's parents visit, her father convinces Jase to take him on a quail hunt. But while their "bonding hunt" yields very few quail, it does bring them closer together as friends. Meanwhile, Willie helps John Luke start his own snow cone business.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Flock and Key
programme.desc: Si recruits his nephews to help him transport a storage container to his backyard, but things take a turn when Jep becomes locked inside the box. Meanwhile, Jase helps Mia prepare for her cheerleading competition, but the only problem is he has no idea.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Ball in the Family
programme.desc: When Willie's old rival Phillip McMillan challenges him to a game of dodgeball, Willie recruits his family members to settle a score once and for all. Meanwhile, Si thinks his cat is cheating on him with another family, so he recruits Miss Kay.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Drone Survivor
programme.desc: When Jase and Phil make a bet about whether or not human beings in a duck blind are visible from the air, Jep buys a drone copter to get a "bird's eye" view, but ends up losing it in the process.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Alan in Charge
programme.desc: Jase and the guys convince Willie to hire his older brother Alan to work at Duck Commander, but when Alan begins micromanaging everyone, they quickly change their mind. Meanwhile, the ladies take a self-defense class and use John Luke as a punching bag.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Renaissance Men
programme.desc: When the Robertsons throw a Renaissance Fair birthday party for Godwin, various family members compete in a tournament to win knighthood.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Child of God
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark are on hand when a dying woman attempts a reconciliation with her estranged father. She is a single mother who wants her family to take the child.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Match Made in Heaven
programme.desc: Scotty is a lovelorn quadriplegic with a successful law practice. Jonathan is happy to play cupid, but Mark isn't so thrilled about it, because the woman in question is his cousin.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Banker and The Bum
programme.desc: A greedy banker and a good-hearted bum switch places. The bum dies, but the banker is now infused with love and generosity.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Brightest Star
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark meet a child star whose fame is spoiling her rotten, destroying her family and taking away her childhood.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Investment In Caring
programme.desc: Jonathan encourages residents in a neighborhood to unite against a cold-hearted developer.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 4
programme.desc: Previously sealed documents hint at compelling new theories about extraterrestrials. Could aliens be living among us? And could former US Presidents know something we don't?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: UFO Metal: Nations all over the world are rumoured to have found metal debris from UFO crashes. Join the investigation into the alleged wreckages of otherworldly crafts.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Alien Encyclopedia
programme.desc: Series investigating compelling UFO and alien cases by opening previously off-limits secret files. Does the mysterious Blue Planet Project hold the answers?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 14
programme.desc: Alien Gods of Egypt. Experts scrutinise the engineering behind the Egyptians' Sphinx and pyramids. Could this advanced civilisation have received extra-terrestrial help?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: This episode investigates the claim that there is an alien presence already on Earth.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Earth Portals: Experts unravel the secrets of the universe's earth portals: shortcuts through space that allow travellers to span vast distances in the blink of an eye.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Join us as we investigate the existence of UFOs and determine the possibility that they may be from Earth.

programme.title: Dynasty: Carousel
programme.desc: Dex beats Alexis to an oil contract; Jeff confronts Adam about Kirby's pregnancy; Krystle accepts Blake's marriage proposal.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Wedding
programme.desc: Adam proposes marriage to Kirby, who intends to divorce Jeff; Tracy persuades Krystle to give her the company credit cards and confidential files; Peter makes a pass at Claudia; Krystle and Blake are remarried.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Ring
programme.desc: A stranger greets little Danny by name; worried, Claudia moves the family into the mansion; Peter DeVilbis' architect hints at the playboy's drug problem; Kirby's hand swells uncontrollably.

programme.title: Dynasty: Lancelot
programme.desc: Kirby's health problems continue; Peter urges Fallon to try cocaine; Tracy sabotages Krystle at the office to gain Blake's favor; Allegre the race horse is stolen; Claudia receives violets - from her late husband.

programme.title: Dynasty: Seizure
programme.desc: Blake receives a ransom note for the return of his horse; Peter announces Fallon will be his wife; Dex and Alexis mix business with pleasure; Kirby suffers a seizure.

programme.title: Dynasty: A Little Girl
programme.desc: Blake grows suspicious of Peter DeVilbis; Claudia receives more violets from 'Lancelot'; Adam tells Blake the truth of the poisoning incident; after suffering a seizure, Kirby undergoes emergency surgery and loses her baby.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: For years, Nicole has had her pictures stolen to make fake profiles, one of which has been catfishing Ryan for ten years. Ryan and Nicole are unsure whether it's a random troll, or they have a common enemy.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Jasmine writes to Nev and Max asking for help for a "friend". But they're perplexed when Jasmine drops a bombshell revelation: they've helped her friend before! (S6, ep19)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Sunny & Jamison
programme.desc: Sunny is in love with the man of her dreams. Jamison is a model, a TV writer, and also studying to be an anaesthesiologist. However, the pair have never met. Is Jamison too good to be true?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Trina & Scorpio
programme.desc: Trina is a dancer who always had trouble meeting trustworthy guys, until she met Scorpio, a fellow dancer, online. Will Trina finally get to rendezvous with the only man she's ever loved? (S1, ep2)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Kim & Matt
programme.desc: Kim's been pouring her heart out to Matt for over 10 years. Now, Kim's facing a life-changing decision - should she marry her current boyfriend or find out if Matt is her soul mate?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jasmine & Mike
programme.desc: Jasmine has been texting with Mike for two years and thinks he could be the perfect step-father for her son. Although they live only 15 minutes apart, the pair have yet to meet up in person.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Pushing the Limit
programme.desc: Jenelle asks to move in with Barbara, Chelsea's dad continues to put the pressure on her, Kailyn starts dating her ex and Leah tries to get some answers about Ali's condition.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Slippery Slope
programme.desc: Jo confronts Kailyn about dating Jordan, Leah continues planning for her wedding, Jenelle and Kieffer hatch a plan to run off and things between Chelsea and Adam go downhill.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Two Steps Forward
programme.desc: Things between Leah and Corey turn ugly, Chelsea decides to celebrate her break-up, Jenelle's plans start to crumble and Kailyn settles into life at her mum's house.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: One Step Back
programme.desc: Chelsea argues with Adam about child support, Jenelle has to face the music, Kailyn tries to focus on college and Leah and Corey get closer.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: Chelsea's dad tries to cut Adam out of her life, Jenelle is arrested for breaking and entering, Kailyn signs a joint custody agreement and Leah and Corey tie the knot. Last in the series.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Finale Special: Check Up With Dr. Drew
programme.desc: Dr Drew hosts the cast of Teen Mom 2 on-stage in front of a live studio audience. Jenelle, Chelsea, Kailyn and Leah reflect on the struggles of their first year of motherhood.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Help Wanted

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIOUS AND UNSOLVED DISSAPEARANCES
programme.desc: Legally declared dead, bodies never found. Disappearances spark speculation, media attention, and unanswered questions. Where did they go?

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SECRET TECHNOLOGIES
programme.desc: Scientists, engineers, military, and intelligence agencies push boundaries with unlimited budgets and secrecy. This episode unveils known (or suspected) top-secret projects.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: THE MYSTERY AND CULTS OF MUMMIES
programme.desc: Unlock the mystery of mummification from ancient Egypt to present. Explore its fascination and quest for Queen Nefertiti's mummy. Where did 70 million ancient mummies disappear? Delve into Latin American mummy legends.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: UNSOLVED MYSTERIES IN PHYSICS
programme.desc: In the late 19th century, scientists thought all major physics laws were discovered. Now, we realize vast unknowns remain. Despite our understanding, mysteries persist in the physical world.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MEDICAL MYSTERIES
programme.desc: Medical history is rife with jaw-dropping oddities, miraculous recoveries, and unsolved mysteries. Beyond shock value, these cases showcase human resilience and the vast unknowns in understanding the body and mind.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SECRET PROJECTS AND OPERATIONS
programme.desc: Imagine a world with open use of resources from secret government projects. Little is known about these black ops. They hold mysteries and consequences, challenging democratic ideals. History reveals human experimentation, contrary to official claims.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIES OF HIDDEN ROOMS
programme.desc: Throughout history, humanity has been captivated by hidden places—rooms, passages, and chambers. Whether for escape or sinister motives, these ten notable hidden spaces span the ages, revealing intrigue and mystery.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SUPRESSED INVENTIONS IN HISTORY
programme.desc: Explore lost or suppressed inventions from history, some skeptical, others mysterious. Despite doubts, many are useful today. Stay open-minded as we delve into these intriguing relics.

programme.title: Secrets Of The London Underground
programme.desc: Tim and Siddy experience the breath-taking newest east-west railway, the Elizabeth Line.

programme.title: Secrets Of The London Underground
programme.desc: The tables are turned and it's Tim who's the tour guide, showing Siddy around two Underground stations.

programme.title: Secrets Of The London Underground
programme.desc: Siddy has arranged incredible access; they have special permission to explore Greenwich Power Station

programme.title: Secrets Of The London Underground
programme.desc: Tim and Siddy explore the disused parts of Baker Street.

programme.title: Secrets Of The London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway explore the labyrinthine Camden Town station, and the forgotten wartime shelter built beneath. Plus, Siddy visits a station which hides a lost river.

programme.title: Secrets Of The London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway explore the disused areas of South Kensington station, with platforms reclaimed by nature and fascinating wartime uses. Siddy also heads to Marylebone.

programme.title: Naked Science: Mars
programme.desc: Mars our closest neighbor now a lifeless planet – but it may once have had water and therefore life. Naked Science investigates the red planet to learn how it was formed, how it became barren, and ask whether it ever will be possible to colonize it?

programme.title: Naked Science: The Great Flood
programme.desc: Almost every culture on Earth tells the story of an ancient flood – details vary but the basic plot is the same - An angry God wipes out an unrepentant population.

programme.title: Naked Science: How To Avert an Asteroid Impact
programme.desc: Throughout history, the earth has been bombarded from space. Asteroid impacts have caused mass extinctions – including the dinosaur wipe out.

programme.title: Naked Science: Great Lakes
programme.desc: The Great Lakes are sometimes referred to as inland seas; they are the largest freshwater system in the world. Naked Science examines the early history of these amazing bodies

programme.title: Naked Science: Snowball Earth
programme.desc: There is a theory that scientists once dismissed as absurd - that long ago the Earth became so cold every inch of it was entombed in ice.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Seasons of Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the second largest planet and has an astonishing 60 moons in its orbit. Thanks to the Cassini mission, it's also one of the most studied and most photographed planets in our neighborhood.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Vesta Unveiled
programme.desc: With the Dawn missions exploration of the asteroid Vesta and the dwarf planet Ceres, asteroids are a hot topic. See what these incredible missions have uncovered.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Water Worlds
programme.desc: The key ingredient to life in the universe is water. Until recently we thought Earth was the only place in the solar system to have any water at all. Now that probes are peering around nearby worlds we are finding that is just not the case.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity has long been a force that has intrigued scientists. Now, for the first time scientists are probing to detect gravity waves in space as well as mapping the gravity patterns of the moon.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Science and the Shuttle
programme.desc: For more than 25 years the shuttle was our ticket to space, and our laboratory in orbit. Uncover the legacy of this amazing machine, and see what lies ahead.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landing on Mars
programme.desc: Mars sparks our curiosity like no other planet because it is so reachable. Despite having landed there, most of the information we gather is still done by instruments in the planet's orbit.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Milky Way
programme.desc: This episode traces our view of the Milky Way, from the mythology of ancient sky watchers to the efforts of scientists to map it from the inside out.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Big Bang
programme.desc: Throughout history, our nightly view of the universe has fueled our collective imagination. When it comes to the Big Bang, not even the most creative work of imagination can rival what science has revealed about the birth of the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Hot Zone
programme.desc: Mercury is one Earth's closest neighbors, but for centuries it eluded astronomer's best efforts to learn its secrets. But that has changed thanks to missions like Mariner and most recently, Messenger.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rays
programme.desc: Cosmic rays can tell us much about the universe. They are not simply another form of light, but carriers of information about powerful and unseen processes at work thousands or even millions of light years away.

programme.title: Britain's Bloody Crown
programme.desc: Dan Jones tells then story of Richard Neville, Earl of Warwick.

programme.title: Britain's Bloody Crown
programme.desc: Did Richard III really kill the 'Princes in the Tower'?

programme.title: Britain's Bloody Crown
programme.desc: Dan Jones reveals the remarkable story of Henry VII's mother.

programme.title: Britain's Great Cathedrals with Tony Robinson: Durham Cathedral

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Sicily isn’t about fast food or the fast life. It’s about savoring family, life, food and making the most of what you have. Tony will go in search of those foods and their producers and eat his way around the island.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Once Johannesburg was the most dangerous city in the world, but the end of the apartheid has lead to vast changes in the city. Tony visits the Johannesburg suburb of Hillbrow, and discovers the culture and, of course food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Bourdain looks at the Congo as one of the more industrialized powers in Africa now largely crumbled to nothingness and chaos with Tim Butcher author of Blood River.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown: Salvador, Brazil
programme.desc: Tony heads back to his much-beloved Salvador, Brazil. The ever-present street festivals and the famous Carnival parade begin with sitting down with a local artist in the streets of the historic Pelo.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Roy Choi’s food reflects a new American idea of "natural" fusion. Bourdain examines the meeting point of Asian, Mexican, Latino culture in modern LA.

programme.title: Arthur: Buster Spaces Out/The Long Road Home
programme.desc: Inspired by footage of the moon landing, Buster wants to go to outer space someday! For now, it'd be cool to build and launch a rocket! Then, after costing Lakewood Elementary the win in a relay race, George wants to redeem himself.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Family Vacation/Grandpa Dave's Old Country Farm
programme.desc: What's got moldy bathrooms, lumpy beds and lots of rain? Arthur's family vacation. Then, Arthur and D.W. go to visit their grandfather, but the visit doesn't turn out as expected, because Grandpa Dave isn't your usual kind of grandfather.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's First Sleepover/Arthur's New Year's Eve
programme.desc: Have you ever been afraid of the dark? Despite D.W.'s threat of aliens, Arthur sets his tent for his first sleepover. Then, what exactly happens at midnight, December 31st? There are plenty of rumors, but no one seems to know for sure.

programme.title: Arthur: Binky Barnes, Wingman/To Beat Or Not To Beat
programme.desc: Does Binky have a favorite pastime? Not until citywide Bug Week, when suddenly all he can think about is butterflies. Then, there's a horrible racket in Elwood City, and it's Francine practicing her singing and drumming for the Talent Show!

programme.title: Arthur: My Music Rules/That's A Baby Show!

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Sells Out/Mind Your Manners
programme.desc: To earn the money for a new video game, Arthur decides to sell his old toys through his school's Web site. The Tibble Twins want to take Grandmother out to dinner, but she'd rather stay home. Is it because of their terrible table manners?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur The Wrecker/Arthur and The True Francine
programme.desc: Arthur always seems to wreck things, and this time it's Mom's computer. Can he get it fixed before Mom finds out? Then, Muffy A. Crosswire and Francine are absolute best friends, despite their rather obvious differences.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Meets Mister Rogers/Draw!
programme.desc: Mister Rogers is staying at Arthur's house! Mister Rogers is a nice guy, but... his show is for babies! Can Arthur hide the visit from his friends? Next, the trouble starts when Fern draws a not-too-flattering cartoon of Francine.

programme.title: Battle for the Bulge
programme.desc: The Battle for the Bulge was the last major German offensive move on the Western Front during the Second World War.

programme.title: Battle of Britain: The Race For Radar
programme.desc: On the brink of war the Germans mount a daring Zeppelin spy mission. Had the Luftwaffe spies discovered Britain’s greatest secret?'

programme.title: Embedded 45' - Shooting War in Germany: Embedded 45 - Shooting War in Germany 1
programme.desc: This first episode covers the last week of February to late March. When American troops started their final invasion of Nazi Germany in February 1945, U.S. Army cameramen were at their side.

programme.title: Embedded 45' - Shooting War in Germany: Embedded 45 - Shooting War in Germany 2
programme.desc: This second episode covers the last week of March to late April. The cameramen covered many stories of victory and defeat, death and liberation. Faces of despair and joy, scenes of war and peace.

programme.title: Gestapo: Hitler's Secret Police
programme.desc: Hermann Goering’s Secret State Police were tasked to arrest and torture confessions and information from supposed enemies of the Reich.

programme.title: Hitler's British Island
programme.desc: On the orders of Adolf Hitler, the Nazi invaders of Alderney, a tiny island in the English Channel, shipped in more than 5,000 slave labourers to build an astonishing series of fortifications designed to protect the island from attack.

programme.title: Hell On Earth WWII
programme.desc: The war enters its third year with battlefields in Eastern Europe, North Africa and the Asia/Pacific. The Battle of Midway, a battle with irreversible consequences, is a victory for the USA.

programme.title: How To Lose A War

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: August 2, 2005 - Flight 358 bursts into flames when it skids off the runway in Toronto during a raging thunderstorm. More than 300 passengers and crew have only seconds to escape the burning plane.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Smoke starts filling the cabin of a passenger jet. At the same time, the flight crew witness a shower of white sparks hitting their windshield. Within moments, the four engines of the 747 shut down.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: A mechanical problem at the back of an Air Canada DC-9 turns into an emergency 10. The pilot has to attempt an emergency landing. The plane goes up in flames 90 seconds after it hits the runway.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Korean Air Flight 801 crashes five km short of its destination. More than 200 people on board are killed. The crash is the beginning of a crusade for one passenger determined to make air travel safer.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: In Valencia, a couple try pushing their bike business to the next level. The expat owners of a bed & breakfast end their season busier than ever, and two former teachers take on their biggest booking yet.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A mother and daughter team with a dream of running a home furnishing shop in the Costa Blanca. A couple swaps Harlow with the French countryside and a future as holiday homeowners, and a yoga teacher from Somerset tests out a Spanish villa.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A yoga teacher has a rude awakening in Spain. In France, the British owners of a gite welcome their biggest booking, and there’s drama in the Costa Blanca as the new owners find out they won’t receive their merchandise in time for opening.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: In the Costa Blanca, a family of expats moves into their new home. In France, two gite owners race against time to renovate their barn. And a worrying start in business for a Somerset yoga teacher whose dream to run retreats hangs in the balance.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Thoroughbreds - Part 2
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark try to help Lizzie. The new bride has cancer and she is pregnant.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Join us as we investigate the existence of UFOs and determine the possibility that they may be from Earth.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: America's Flying Saucer
programme.desc: Discover America's new killer aircraft and the out-of-this-world technology the US military uses to conquer the globe.

programme.desc: There are those who wish to control what others think, how they act and what they believe. Discover the new practices in mind-control.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Haarp
programme.desc: Governments around the world may be using weather control to incite the next World War and possibly destroy the planet.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: America's Alien Wars
programme.desc: Has our government been at war with alien aggressors for the past half century? Startling evidence indicates that the US military has been under attack and has kept it from the public.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Global Depopulation
programme.desc: Disasters, famine and pandemics threaten civilisation on a global scale. A cataclysmic event may spell the end of civilisation and the human race could face extinction.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Remote Viewing
programme.desc: Documents may prove that the government has a secret group of remote viewers watching its citizens: the CIA's 'psy ops army'.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Secret Government Warehouses
programme.desc: From Fort Knox to Hangar 18 and Camp Hero, discover a series of top-secret and high-security national database centres.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Rise Of The Machines
programme.desc: If technology goes too far, too fast, a time may come when humans are no longer at the top of the evolutionary food chain.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Bigfoot
programme.desc: The evidence for Bigfoot piles up, causing some to wonder who has been keeping information from the public.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Anti-Christ?
programme.desc: Every culture and religion on the planet believes that an evil one will usher in the end of days. But who is this Anti-Christ? And how can we hope to stop him?

programme.title: Dynasty: A Little Girl
programme.desc: Blake grows suspicious of Peter DeVilbis; Claudia receives more violets from 'Lancelot'; Adam tells Blake the truth of the poisoning incident; after suffering a seizure, Kirby undergoes emergency surgery and loses her baby.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Accident
programme.desc: Allegre is returned and Blake's suspicions about Peter's involvement are founded; Tracy orchestrates a press campaign to ruin Krystle; learning her fiance has left the country, Fallon dashes from the hotel and is struck by a truck.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Vigil
programme.desc: Peter DeVilbis, caught while trying to leave the country, is arrested for possession of drugs and jailed; Blake is offered a political post; Fallon regains consciousness and learns she is paralyzed.

programme.title: Dynasty: Steps
programme.desc: Alexis attempts to bribe Kirby to prevent her from marrying Adam; Claudia receives another package from her late husband; Fallon remains unable to walk, until her child's life is in danger.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jasmine & Mike

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jarrod & Abby

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Steven & Samm

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SUPRESSED INVENTIONS IN HISTORY
programme.desc: Explore lost or suppressed inventions from history, some skeptical, others mysterious. Despite doubts, many are useful today. Stay open-minded as we delve into these intriguing relics.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: HUMAN SACRIFICES
programme.desc: Human sacrifice, practiced since the Paleolithic era, was seen as a gift to gods for cosmic order. Found in black magic, voodoo, and Satanism, these rituals may hint at a mysterious connection to higher forces.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: It’s one of the most powerful and enduring myths ever created. The Garden of Eden. One maverick scholar, Dr Juris Zarins sets out to prove its existence.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: This is a story of one man’s obsession to find a lost Spanish Galleon loaded with treasure. He risked everything – and faced terrible personal tragedy in his quest.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: A young archaeologist risks everything in his quest to find one of the world’s greatest treasures – the fabled lost library of Ivan the Terrible.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Mysterious and bizarre deaths happen when an amateur prospector searches for lost Aztec treasure. Is this the curse of Montezuma’s Treasure at work?

programme.title: Secrets Of The London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway explore the disused areas of South Kensington station, with platforms reclaimed by nature and fascinating wartime uses. Siddy also heads to Marylebone.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Hitmen
programme.desc: Hitmen are masters of covering their tracks. Their only concern is for loyalty and the greatest possible profit. Investigators must always take care not to become the next victim.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Gang Bosses
programme.desc: They rule the underworld: gang bosses. They make millions with racketeering and drug trafficking. For investigators, it is more than a fight against criminality – it is a veritable war.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Rampage Killers
programme.desc: Rampage Killers. They come out of nowhere – and when they occur, innocent people always die. Investigators must react in a flash and make difficult decisions. Every killing spree is a race against time.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Woman Killers
programme.desc: Ted Bundy – maybe the most famous Woman Killer. But there are more. Ant they all create a perfect social environment in which no one recognizes their true nature.

programme.title: Naked Science: Snowball Earth

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Across the Great Divided Lonesome Mighty River
programme.desc: Everybody loves a great western! Except Larry. Terry gets Larry to test more scenes from classic western movies!

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rays
programme.desc: Cosmic rays can tell us much about the universe. They are not simply another form of light, but carriers of information about powerful and unseen processes at work thousands or even millions of light years away.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Fermi Paradox
programme.desc: The Fermi Paradox asks the ultimate question: Given a few reasonable assumptions about the chance of life arising elsewhere in the universe and the distance between the stars, why has an alien civilization not presented itself?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landsat

programme.title: NEW: Great Tank Battles of World War II

programme.title: NEW: Great Tank Battles of World War II

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The only edible food item left in the ranger's cabin is a salmon stuck inside a block of ice. Starving, Grizzly decides to melt the ice with the blow-dryer. Only the Lemmings are already using it for their latest rocket game in the piping system.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have unearthed a box filled with birthday fountains of light that spit forth giant bursts of sparks. They have a blast, but their new game is not really compatible with a bear's nap.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy's last jar of chocolate spread has been pinched by the Lemmings, who are savouring it in secret.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The vibrations created by Grizzly's snoring during his nap give the Lemmings an idea for a bouncing game. But when Grizzly changes positions and his snoring stops, the Lemmings must find other sources of vibrations.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy finds a birthday piñata in the ranger's living room. The idea of bursting open a papier-mâché statue with a bat as it says in the instructions pleases him.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Inside a mysterious cave, Grizzy and the Lemmings discover a magical Game of the Goose. The events displayed in the squares that the players land on come true in real life.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzly discovers the leftovers of a Halloween party in the ranger's cabin, which was entirely redecorated for the occasion.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy finds a strange figurine with the power to switch the spirits of two living beings and finds himself imprisoned in the body of a caribou.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: The Game: Oh, What A Night
programme.desc: Tasha, being insecure, worries that her relationship with Rick Fox has no future, so she starts playing the field.

programme.title: The Game: The Negotiation Episode
programme.desc: Derwin helps Jason try to win Kelly back, putting an end to all divorce talk, but then things go not as planned.

programme.title: The Game: Insert Car Here
programme.desc: Jason loses his mind when he finds Kelly on a date with another man named Joe, in the car he gave her for a gift.

programme.title: The Game: Stay Fierce, Malik
programme.desc: During an exclusive interview with Extra's Tanika Ray whatever, Robin Givens insinuates that Malik is gay, and for that reason, he wants to break up with her.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Shadow Caster
programme.desc: PRS investigates an Alabama home where clients, Georgiana and her two daughters, are so terrified, they moved out after only 18 months. They have seen shadow figures, been touched and have a recorded EVP stating, "Look at me, get out of here."

programme.title: Paranormal State: Satan's Soldier
programme.desc: Mark and Kim can't sleep through the racket caused by unseen forces in their central Indiana home. When PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger discover what appears to be blood in the basement, they investigate a history of violence in the home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dark Practice
programme.desc: Brenda is terrified by a dark hooded figure spotted in her West Virginia home. The same entity allegedly tormented her late husband. PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger help Brenda before she slips into the same abyss as her late husband.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Ranch
programme.desc: PRS saddles up to a remote ranch in Hunt, Texas where black shadows are being spotted and animals harmed. What's more, a mysterious crop circle has formed on the property and the horses refuse to cross it.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Paranormal Detour
programme.desc: With time off between cases, Ryan suggests to the PRS team they choose a random town to investigate. They roll into St. Helens, Oregon, home of Twilight, where they learn about the long history of the paranormal in the area.

programme.title: Paranormal State: First Contact
programme.desc: Washington State, a hotbed of unexplained paranormal activity. Between possible UFOs in the sky and winged creatures in the woods, Ryan and his team are forced to face their fears and deal with the question: Are we truly alone in the universe?

programme.title: Paranormal State: Church of the Damned
programme.desc: Jason and his family can no longer do renovations of an abandoned Kansas church, especially after they found their father in the basement crying and frightened because of the menacing activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fire
programme.desc: Christina has been experiencing paranormal activity ever since her father and step-mother were murdered near Columbus, OH last year. PRS and psychic/medium?Chip Coffey delve into a open murder case and wind up exposing a family divide.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Spirits of the Slave Dungeon
programme.desc: Ryan books a two-night case in a real haunted jail in Charleston, SC, but PRS soon realizes the spirits themselves are being held there against their will and subjected to an unjust form of torture.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Name
programme.desc: Ryan Buell and company set out on one of their most dangerous cases to date - to help a single mother who is experiencing paranormal activity in a home that was once the site of brutal murder.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Asylum
programme.desc: PRS explores a New York State Prison that was once a mental asylum. Ryan and his team go behind bars to uncover the institution's paranormal past and present.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Birmingham Central
programme.desc: Yvette takes her team to a disused prison in Birmingham which has housed some of the most notorious criminals in British history.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Dudley Castle
programme.desc: The ruins that make up Dudley Castle house a plethora of paranormal activity for Yvette and her team to investigate. Strange noises and a violent poltergeist await them as they turn the lights out and do battle with the unseen forces.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Llanfyliln House Part 1
programme.desc: Workhouses were not the best of places to be, so why would anyone stay after they had died? Yvette takes her team on a memorable journey to find out. For a few team members it was a night they will never forget as they are pushed to the very limits.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Llanfyliln House Part 2
programme.desc: Whatever was making itself known to the team earlier, continues in this episode as something seems to be following Yvette from the shadows.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Beaumanor Hall Part 1
programme.desc: Yvette takes the Most Haunted team into the very haunted, disused attic at the top of this huge country mansion and are soon made to feel very unwelcome. Yvette is pushed to the limits and Karl is followed by a very heavily booted phantom.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Tram
programme.desc: The leaders of two underworld factions call a top-level meeting at a ski resort to set up a financial holding company capable of creating chaos within the national economy.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Mindbend
programme.desc: To help the IMF team break up a crime syndicate that specializes in brainwashing ex-convicts into committing political assassinations, Barney substitutes for a former prisoner looking for an operation to give himself a new appearance.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Shape-Up
programme.desc: Guest stars Gerald S. O'Loughlin and Christopher Stone portray crime syndicate bosses in charge of the waterfront who extort huge sums of money from every ship docking at a west coast port.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Miracle
programme.desc: An undercover agent is murdered while trying to intercept a huge heroin shipment in the Pacific Northwest and the IMF team is called to take over and put the dealer and his chief executioner out of business.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Encounter
programme.desc: Guest star Elizabeth Ashley plays the alcoholic wife of a crime syndicate leader whose involvement in an intimidation racket and the cold-blooded murder of an employee puts the IMF team on his trail.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Great American Cashtime
programme.desc: Rare 1950s Master Pitch baseball machine; 1980s Jaws of Life tool used by rescuers to pry open cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Off the Deep End
programme.desc: Ton and Allen quarrel over bidding strategy at a rare auction on Catalina Island and must race against the clock to unload a one man submersible that could be worth big money… if they can make it work.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fake Punt Payoff
programme.desc: Ton and Allen contend with a large crowd of inexperienced auction-buyers at a huge storage container auction in Pasadena. They find a small fleet of Segway personal transporters and an enormous custom-made shotgun.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Friends in Hawaii Places
programme.desc: Allen &Ton enlist an assistant, Carolyn, and Allen's Hawaiian buddy, Junior, to help them battle local buyers. The guys find a WWII-era motor scooter and a stash of antique Polynesian tattoo tools that get used on Ton!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Driller Instinct
programme.desc: Ton & Allen encounter aggressive outdoorsmen in the Alaskan wilderness. The guys discover an 8-wheeled ATV that travels on both land & water and an air percussion hammer that can drill through solid rock!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Always Money in Philadelphia
programme.desc: In Philadelphia, the guys face a shady bidder with inside information and former NFL star Vince Papale in a battle for a vintage football passing machine and a colonial musket that could be worth huge money if it's real.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Hot Commodity
programme.desc: Allen is late to the auction, leaving Ton to battle a feisty female auction buyer on his own! The guys find a fully functional flamethrower and a rare hand-carved bow and arrow set from South America!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: With Ton missing, Allen struggles to keep the pawn shop afloat while training Elle to work an auction. After a fierce bidding war with Caroline, pieces from a century old motorcycle may not be enough to save the day. ed.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Beantown Bidders
programme.desc: 1800s blackpowder whaling harpoon; 1940s Schwinn Town & Country tandem bicycle; a vintage American flag collection that could be worth thousands.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Labor of Love
programme.desc: Harley Davidson V-twin EVO engine and revolutionary 1958 dual-suspension swingarm frame; '80s Ms. Pac-Man arcade machine; rare Air Jordan vintage shoe collection in mint condition.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Flying Ton, Creeping Allen
programme.desc: When a group of thugs try to bully Ton and Allen out of a Chinatown auction, the guys fight back, leading to a violent showdown and the discovery of both a rare Bornean blowgun and special effects wire harnesses.

programme.desc: See how ghostly visitors help two people deal with the deaths of loved ones.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Exorcism Of Cindy Sauer
programme.desc: Georgia single mother Cindy Sauer is finally getting back on her feet after the sudden death of her husband. But as she is recovering from her loss, nightmares and dark shadows haunt the family and mark the beginning of something far worse.

programme.title: A Haunting: Conjuring Evil
programme.desc: Harold and Cindy have found the perfect retreat in suburban Alaska for their family. But after their daughter begins to experiment in witchcraft, she unknowingly attracts the attention of a dark entity. Harold calls in experts to help reclaim the home.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When US marine veteran Darrell Blagg is found shot dead outside his New Mexico home, a lucky break leads detectives to suspect his wife has links to the murderer.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After the naked body of an Ohio State senior is found, investigators bring in a suspect for questioning. They play a dangerous game of give and take, hoping to get the truth and bring justice to the victim and her family.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Kathy Lujan, a married mother of two young boys, is believed to have run away with one of her lovers. Detective Rosie Rodriguez chases a trail of evidence and suspects that reveal the truth about Kathy's whereabouts.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Devoted mother Heather Strong disappears, leaving her estranged husband Josh to care for her two children, as he also falls under suspicion.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: JFK
programme.desc: Richard meets with some prominent JFK assassination researchers to discuss the November 1963 murder of President John F. Kennedy.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Pterodactyls
programme.desc: Richard speaks with several explorers and cryptozoologists who believe pterodactyls, flying dinosaurs thought to have become extinct some 60 million years ago, are alive and thriving in remote places such as Papua New Guinea.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Woman Killers
programme.desc: Ted Bundy – maybe the most famous Woman Killer. But there are more. Ant they all create a perfect social environment in which no one recognizes their true nature.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Female Murderers
programme.desc: Women usually kill in their own peculiar way: sophisticated, tactically, and from behind. They prefer tainted medicines, knives, or poison. And they often kill for years, unnoticed and in secret.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Angels of Death
programme.desc: In hospitals and nursing wards, death is an everyday occurrence. And that is precisely what they count on: angels of death. Some of them rack up more victims in this way than the worst serial killers in the world.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Ruthless Killers
programme.desc: Ruthless Killers: They kill for all manner of reasons. Their victims: men, women, and even children. What motivates them, and how can they be stopped? Investigators reach their limits hunting them down.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Bank Robbers
programme.desc: Bank robbers. They are clever, planning their crimes for years. And if necessary, they even put human lives at risk. For investigators, each heist is different. But all robbers have one thing in common: they steal millions.

programme.title: Arthur: Caught in the Crosswires/Framed

programme.title: Arthur: The Blizzard/The Rat Who Came To Dinner

programme.title: Arthur: The Pageant Pickle/Some Assembly Required

programme.title: Arthur: Bud's Knotty Problem/That’s MY Grandma!

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'s Blankie/Arthur's Substitute Teacher Trouble
programme.desc: D.W. has one little secret--her blankie. When it mysteriously disappears, Arthur is pressed into service. Find that blankie--or else! Next, the unbelievable has happened--Mr. Ratburn has gotten sick. And who's going to be the substitute?

programme.title: Arthur: The Boy Who Cried Comet/Arthur and Los Vecinos
programme.desc: Buster is convinced that he's seen real UFO's, and he uses Muffy's fancy new telescope to get the proof. Then, Mr. Sipple from next door is moving away and Arthur wonders--who will be the new neighbors?

programme.title: NEW: Great Tank Battles of World War II
programme.desc: The fourth episode sees the Germans well and truly on the retreat and the Allies are able to successfully implement operation Husky: the landing on Sicily.

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies
programme.desc: The series begins before WWI when military commanders struggled to understand what uses aviation might have. The Wright Brothers had been the first to fly a powered aircraft in controlled flight in 1903, but even by 1914 aircraft were still underpowered.

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies
programme.desc: The 1920s and 30s were uncertain times for the RAF as well as all other armed services. With peace came cuts in spending on new aircraft development.

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies
programme.desc: By the end of the war the RAF had aircraft that could escort bombers to targets deep inside Germany and back. With the Gloster Meteor, the RAF had also entered the ‘Jet Age’. Aircraft like the Hawker Hunter and F-86 Sabre took the RAF supersonic.

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Butterflies - Nature Of Things

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Once Upon a Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Mario is trying to write his very own fairy tale. The children help by acting out some of their favorite fairy tales to give Mario some ideas.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Playing Games - No, No, No!
